hero.alt: American bison standing in open grassland under a wide sky
hero.caption: American bison are huge, shaggy grazers with a humped shoulder and short, curved horns.

habitat.fileTitle: File:American bison in Yellowstone National Park.jpg
habitat.alt: American bison on open grassland in Yellowstone National Park
habitat.caption: Bison live on the wide grasslands and prairies of North America, like Yellowstone's valleys.

diet.fileTitle: File:Yellowstone National Park (WY, USA), Upper Geyser Basin, Bison -- 2022 -- 2578.jpg
diet.alt: American bison grazing on grass in Yellowstone
diet.caption: Bison are herbivores that spend most of the day eating grasses and other low plants.

baby.alt: Reddish-brown American bison calf standing on a grassy ridge
baby.caption: Newborn bison calves are orange-red, which is why people nickname them 'red dogs.'

family.alt: Adult American bison standing beside its young calf
family.caption: Mother bison stay close to their calves and raise them inside a large protective herd.

range.alt: Herd of American bison spread across Hayden Valley grassland
range.caption: Once millions roamed North America; today bison live mostly in parks and protected herds.
range.location: Hayden Valley, Yellowstone National Park, USA

size.alt: Full body side view of a large plains bison bull
size.caption: Bison are North America's biggest land animals, with bulls weighing up to a ton.

closeup.alt: Close-up of an American bison's head, horns, and shaggy hair
closeup.caption: A thick mane and curved horns protect the bison's head during pushing contests.

fun-fact.fileTitle: File:A snow-covered bison resting in a winter storm (33335764868).jpg
fun-fact.alt: American bison covered in snow resting during a winter storm
fun-fact.caption: Bison are built for blizzards and swing their huge heads to sweep snow off the grass.

core-habitat.fileTitle: File:Yellowstone National Park (WY, USA), Old Faithful Geyser (und Bison) -- 2022 -- 2587.jpg
core-habitat.alt: American bison grazing near the Old Faithful geyser in Yellowstone
core-habitat.caption: Grasslands give bison the open space and steady food they need to thrive.

core-diet.alt: Herd of American bison grazing across open prairie
core-diet.caption: A grown bison can eat many pounds of grass every day to fuel its huge body.

core-baby.alt: American bison calf drinking milk from its mother
core-baby.caption: Calves drink their mother's milk for several months before living on grass alone.

core-family.alt: Group of American bison standing together in a herd
core-family.caption: Bison are social animals that live in herds, which helps keep the young ones safe.

core-range.fileTitle: File:Bison walking in the snow near Tower Junction (0d7cef53-54d5-4ae9-83ed-31c122815864).jpg
core-range.alt: American bison walking through deep snow in winter
core-range.caption: Bison travel across their range in every season, pushing through deep winter snow.
